titleStmt.title: SII 20.391: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 391. (B.K. No. 18 of 1935-36.) LAKSHMƒí≈öVAR, SHIRHATTI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab built into the wall of the backyard of the Taluk Office.

summary.p: This damaged record is dated ≈öaka 14 ‚Ä¢ ‚Ä¢, Vilambi, Prathama-Jyƒìsh·π≠ha, ≈öu‚Ä¢ 1, Monday. The details regularly correspond to A.D. 1538, April 29, if the ≈öaka year was 1460.

The inscription registers a deed of settlement of dispute between the Jainas headed by Sa·πÅkha·πáƒÅchƒÅrya and Hƒìma·πáƒÅchƒÅrya of the ≈öa·πÖkha-basti and KƒÅ·∏∑ahastidƒìva and ≈öivarƒÅmadƒìva of the temple of Dakshi·πáa-S≈çmƒì≈õvaradƒìva regarding the use of certain honours which had been misappropriated by the Jainas for their deity.

encodingDesc.p: Encoded in TEI/EpiDoc according to the DHARMA Encoding Guide for Documentary Editions, version 2

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

neya vi·∏∑a·πÅbi sa·πÅvatsarada prathama jƒì·π£·π≠a ≈õu 1 s≈çmavƒÅradallu ≈õrƒ´maddak·π£i·πáa s≈çmƒì≈õvaradƒìvara divya≈õrƒ´pƒÅdapadmƒÅ

ga·∏∑ƒÅgi saluva A·π£·π≠adikpƒÅlƒÅdiga·∏∑a dhvajapatƒÅkƒÅdiga·∏∑anu nƒÅu namma ≈õa·πÅ

kƒÅ·∏∑ahastidƒìvara satyavacanasamudƒÅyadi·πÅ kƒì·∏∑ida jiya·πÅba·π≠·π≠u nƒÅu na·πÅma jinasamayakke A·π£·π≠a
dikpƒÅ lƒÅdiga·∏∑u dhvajapatƒÅkƒÅdiga·∏∑u sallave·πÅdu ko·π≠·π≠a jayapatrike . ≈õrƒ´ s≈çmanƒÅtha·πÅ ga·πáakumƒÅra
